name: Cable Car Barn & Powerhouse
summary_en: Archive documents describe the Cable Car Barn, Powerhouse and Museum at Washington and Mason, including a 1980 East/West notice on rehabilitation of the Cable Car Barn, a Civil Grand Jury report on the rebuilt cable car barn and cable drive system, and a Municipal Railway strategic plan proposing a Cable Car Museum renovation. PUC Hetch Hetchy annual reports note the cable-winding machinery located in the Cable Car Powerhouse, and Municipal Transportation Agency minutes cover a curator/concessionaire agreement with the Friends of the Cable Car Museum. The facility is operated by the Municipal Transportation Agency (Muni), whose FY2025 budget line is $1.5B; no place-specific city contract appears in this data.
